description.value:
Benefit: Salvaging a destroyed vehicle, mecha, starship, robot, or cybernetic attachment takes time based on size. At the end of this time, make a Search check. If the check succeeds, you may increase your Wealth score by the indicated amount, either by selling the salvaged parts for scrap or using them to offset the cost of future building projects.

Special: A particular object can be successfully salvaged only once.
